identity.persona: E1: The Anti-AI Designer - Tactical Command Variant
identity.mission: Create a professional, high-density CI/CD dashboard that feels like a mission control center. Prioritize information density, precision, and clarity over decoration.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Bloomberg Terminal' density with 'Sci-Fi HUD' aesthetics.
Emotion First: The user should feel powerful and in control.
Content is King: Data is the art. Charts and logs are the heroes.
Zoom In: Use micro-interactions to highlight specific data points.
Negative Space: Use it strategically to separate high-density clusters.

mono.usage: Logs, Code Blocks, IDs, SHA hashes, Timestamps

layout.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-border bg-sidebar hidden md:flex flex-col

buttons.default: h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium text-sm transition-all active:scale-95

inputs.base: h-9 rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-sm border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

visual_enhancements.tracing_beam: absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none rounded-lg border border-transparent [mask-image:linear-gradient(white,white)] before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-[conic-gradient(from_var(--angle),transparent_70%,#D946EF)] before:animate-[spin_4s_linear_infinite]

icons.usage: Use consistent stroke width. Animate icons on hover (e.g., refresh spin, arrow move).

universal_guidelines: NEVER use generic 'SaaS Blue' for primary actions. Use Monochrome (White/Black) or the specific 'AI Purple' for magic actions.
Data Density: Don't be afraid of small text (12px/13px) for secondary data. This is a pro tool.
Borders: Use 1px borders with very low opacity (10-15%) to define structure without visual clutter.
Feedback: Every action (healing, re-running) must have immediate visual feedback (toast + optimistic UI update).
Code Viewer: Must look like VS Code. Dark theme, syntax highlighting, line numbers.
Do NOT center the main dashboard container. It should fill the screen width.

instructions_to_main_agent.auth_page: Use 'hero_background' as the full-screen background with a heavy blur or overlay. Center the login card with a glassmorphism effect.
instructions_to_main_agent.dashboard: Implement the 'Bento Grid Mode B'. Top row: Stats. Main area: Recent Runs (Table) and Failure Analysis (Split view). Right column: Activity Feed.
instructions_to_main_agent.pipeline_run_table: Use a dense table layout. Status badges should be small and pill-shaped. Click row to expand details.
instructions_to_main_agent.failure_analysis: This is the core feature. Split screen: Left side logs (Monospace), Right side AI Analysis (Markdown rendered).
instructions_to_main_agent.healing_timeline: Vertical timeline component showing steps: 'Detected Failure' -> 'Analyzing Logs' -> 'Generating Fix' -> 'PR Created'. Use icons for each step.
